title: Monsoon Update – Cyclone Warning with Heavy Rainfall in 11 States, Thunderstorms Expected - Times Bull
article_text:
Monsoon Update – Cyclone Warning with Heavy Rainfall in 11 States, Thunderstorms Expected
vipin kumar
Feb 23 • 6:55AM IST

Monsoon Update: The cold weather in North India is decreasing day by day, bringing relief to the people. Due to the pressure in the Bay of Bengal, many states are facing the threat of thunderstorms, storms, and rain. Snowfall has occurred in Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, and the upper reaches of Kashmir, leading to a drop in temperatures.

Due to the snowfall, temperatures are being recorded below freezing in some areas. Bright sunshine is expected in various areas of Uttar Pradesh. Rising temperatures in Delhi-NCR are also bringing the cold to a halt. Rain is looming in several states of South India. According to the Indian Meteorological Department, rain is expected in several states across the country. You can find out more about the weather conditions in these states below.

Warning of rain accompanied by thunderstorms in these states

According to the Meteorological Department, there is a threat of rain in Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Madhya Pradesh, Meghalaya, Assam, and Arunachal Pradesh. In addition, rain accompanied by thunderstorms is also expected in Telangana, West Bengal, Odisha, Chhattisgarh, and the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. Strong winds are expected during the rains in these states. Wind speeds are expected to reach 50-55 kmph.

Know the Weather in Delhi

According to the Meteorological Department, the weather in the capital, Delhi, i is expected to remain clear today. There is no possibility of rain here, which is why there is a possibility of a rise in temperatures. On Monday, the maximum temperature is expected to be 28 degrees Celsius, while the minimum temperature is expected to be 14 degrees Celsius. Light winds are also expected. The weather is expected to improve here.

Rainfall in Himachal Pradesh

The Meteorological Department has predicted rain in various areas of Himachal Pradesh. According to the IMD, a rain warning has been issued for Bilaspur, Chamba, Hamirpur, Kangra, Kinnaur, Kullu, Lahaul and Spiti, Mandi, and Shimla. A yellow alert has also been issued for heavy rainfall in Sirmaur, Solan, and Una. Lightning is also expected during the rain.

Assam Weather

The Meteorological Department has issued a rain alert for several parts of Assam. According to the IMD, rain is expected in Cachar, Charaideo, Chirang, Darrang, Dhemaji, and Dhubri.

In addition, rain is also possible in Dibrugarh, Dima Hasao, Goalpara, Golaghat, Hailakandi, and Hojai. Heavy rain is also expected in Jorhat, Kamrup, Kamrup Metropolitan, Karbi Anglong, Karimganj, Kokrajhar, and Majuli. Before leaving the house, you can definitely check the weather update once, which will eliminate the confusion.
